arts.ttl: Brighton vs Tottenham Hotspur – Match Preview and Team News
arts.sum: Tottenham travel to the South Coast this Sunday to face a Brighton side that will be looking to recover from their first defeat of the season last weekend. Spurs are on the road for the third successive game, with a 3-0 win at Manchester United preceding a hard-fought victory over win over Hungarian outfit Ferencvaros […] The post Brighton vs Tottenham Hotspur – Match Preview and Team News first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: 'A big challenge to stop him' - Brighton identify Tottenham dangerman for Premier League clash - football.london
arts.sum: Praising the qualities of the ex-Bournemouth ace, Hurzeler remarked: "I think he’s a whole package of a good striker. Brighton manager Fabian Hurzeler has acknowledged the tough task ahead in quelling the threat of Tottenham Hotspur's Dominic Solanke as his team aims to rebound from their last defeat against Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Tottenham scouts attended recent Man United match to monitor 20-year-old talent
arts.sum: Porto’s Samu Omorodion put in an eye-catching display against Man United on Thursday night and Tottenham scouts were in Portugal to witness the striker net a brace against their Premier League rivals. Porto and Man United played out a thriller as part of the league phase of their UEFA Europa League campaigns with Harry Maguire […] The post Tottenham scouts attended recent Man United match to monitor 20-year-old talent appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Hurzeler: I will always back Adam Webster
arts.sum: “First of all, all the people who criticise him or text him critical things on social media, I think we should invite them here and they should have an experience day with Adam Webster – how professional this guy is, how helpful this guy is, how supportive, what a great leader he is. “He made an easy mistake, he knows it, but I think we shouldn't judge the player and the person after making one easy mistake because I see the whole context.

arts.ttl: Tottenham transfer news: £13m Olympic gold medallist 'scouted' in Europa League
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur reportedly had scouts in attendance to watch Porto's Samu Omorodion torment Manchester United in the Europa League on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: THE SHARPE END: Spurs' new attacking guard has a bright future under Ange Postecoglou after years of heavily relying on Son Heung-min and Harry Kane
arts.sum: JAME SHARPE: Ange Postecoglou managed without the departed Kane last season and this term we're seeing a further shift. Son remains a top player but he's 32 and has a hamstring injury.
